excerpts.Games: Those who play don’t cause trouble. And those who have the right game capture attention.
excerpts.Builds and Remodels: We can do it! In the beginning there was a car. There was a bar out of the car. The bar was a podium. The stage was a mobile party. For example. And there is much more.
excerpts.Consumer competitions: Consumer competitions are an important business tool for big brands. Therefore, it is a great challenge for us to provide a complete service for such a complex activity.
excerpts.Website and e-shop: The operation of the e-shop itself is a piece of cake. But creating a new concept together with the client is a challenge!
excerpts.Graphics: From sketches on a handkerchief, graphics for 3D visualization to printing promotional brochures.
excerpts.Creative: Creativity, long overlooked, is increasingly important. We are fully aware of this fact and do everything we can to ensure that our activities are not dull and stereotypical.
excerpts.Conference: A conference doesn't just mean a white name tag with a lanyard and a branded notebook with a pen to go with it.
excerpts.Warehouse and warehouse system: We store material for most of our clients. Year-round or during the season.
excerpts.Event marketing: All events that have passed under our hands can be proud of their originality and strong creativity.
